args: for root in "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/powermem/memory-powermem"/* "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/powermem/memory-powermem"/*; do if [ -f "$root/scripts/powermem-mcp.sh" ]; then exec sh "$root/scripts/powermem-mcp.sh"; fi; done; echo 'PowerMem Codex plugin wrapper not found. Reinstall memory-powermem@powermem.' >&2; exit 1
